summary:
Root resorption starts at approximately 6-7 months after birth as deciduous teeth form their roots; hence, options indicating earlier or later times are incorrect for pediatric dental considerations. \boxed{\text{C}}

The summary captures that root resorption initiates between 6-7 months due to decidual tooth root formation while excluding less pertinent information from Agent2’s original response. It also retains focus solely on clinically-relevant details related directly addressing the specific query posed.
